changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO business_units (id, organization_id, name, description, owner_id, infosec_focal_person_id, created_by_id, updated_by_id) VALUES (101, 105, 'HR', 'Human Resources', 165, null, 161, 161) , (102, 105, 'Finance', 'Finance', 165, null, 161, 161) , (103, 105, 'Payroll', 'Payroll', 165, null, 161, 161) , (104, 105, 'Sales', 'Sales', 165, null, 161, 161) , (105, 105, 'Marketing', 'Marketing', 165, null, 161, 161) , (106, 105, 'Trading', 'Trading', 165, null, 161, 161) , (107, 105, 'Logistics', 'Logistics', 165, null, 161, 161) , (108, 105, 'Benefits', 'Benefits', 165, null, 161, 161) , (109, 105, 'R&D', 'Research and Development', 165, null, 161, 161) , (110, 105, 'Accounting', 'Accounting', null, 167, 161, 161) , (111, 105, 'Production', 'Production', null, 167, 161, 161) , (112, 105, 'Purchasing', 'Purchasing', null, 167, 161, 161) , (113, 105, 'Cyber Risk', 'Risk', null, 167, 161, 161) , (114, 105, 'Innovation', 'Innovation', null, 167, 161, 161) ;
ALTER SEQUENCE business_units_id_seq RESTART WITH 1024;
